name: Avatar
description: Displays an identity marker using an image, initials, or fallback icon.

name.description: Name represented by the avatar; used to derive initials and an accessible label.

nameToInitials.description: Custom function for converting a name into initials.

src.description: Image source URL for the avatar.

size.description: Multiplier for the base avatar size.

fallbackIcon.description: Custom icon used when image and initials are unavailable.

color.description: Background color category for the avatar.

slots.children: Optional custom fallback content (for example, custom SVG or image element).

aria: When `name` is provided, Avatar applies `role="img"` and `aria-label` with the name.
For decorative avatars that duplicate nearby text, use `aria-hidden`.
For alternative fallback icons, provide a context-appropriate `aria-label`.
